name: Shenzhen Envicool Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Envicool Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells temperature control solutions and products in China. It offers AC and DC powered air conditioners, heat exchangers, and combo air conditioner for outdoor cabinets; and telecom site cooling solutions, including free cooling, split AC air conditioners, and split DC air conditioners. The company also provides industrial air conditioners, fans-and-filters, air/water heat exchangers, thermostats/hygrostats, heaters, oil coolers, and water coolers; transport cooling solutions; data center cooling solutions; door/wall mounted units; and floor standing units. Shenzhen Envicool Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
